message:
feat(wait): implement composable quiescence detector with live signal sources

Adds QueueDepthGauge, ActivityTracker, and QuiescenceDetector to the
wait module. The detector aggregates atomic queue depth counters and
monotonic activity timestamps to determine when the system is quiescent
(all queues drained + quiet window elapsed).

Key additions:
- QueueDepthGauge: atomic inc/dec counter with underflow saturation
- ActivityTracker: lock-free monotonic timestamp via AtomicU64 offsets
- QuiescenceDetector: composable builder, implements QuiescenceSignals
- QuiescenceSnapshot: diagnostic snapshot with per-gauge detail
- 15 new unit tests + 2 integration tests (multi-queue drain scenarios)

wa-upg.3.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
